name: retriever
description: Answers clinical questions about a patient's medical history using RAG over anonymized records, returning a concise summary with source citations as proof.

skills.name: Cited clinical history Q&A
skills.description: Retrieve and summarize a patient's medical history with inline source citations.
examples: What is the patient's diabetes management history?
How has blood pressure been over the past year?
Is this patient safe for general anaesthesia?
